name: youtube-search
description: Search YouTube, read full video details and transcripts (including auto-generated captions), and download videos — no API key or Google account required.

metadata.short_description: Keyless YouTube search, transcripts and video downloads.
metadata.mesh_description: The YouTube Search MCP gives agents public YouTube access with zero configuration: search videos/channels/playlists with filters, read full video metadata and descriptions, fetch transcripts (including YouTube's auto-generated captions) as plain text, SRT, VTT or timed JSON, and download videos or audio into the organization's object storage with a shareable download link. No Google account, OAuth or API key required.
